_comment: Foundation F2 — FROZEN golden vectors for DerivePPID. want_ppid = base64url-nopad(HMAC-SHA256(key=secret, msg=uint64be(len(sector)) || sector || user_id)). secret_hex is the hex-encoded per-user pairwise secret. VECTOR-CHANGE POLICY: these expectations must be hand-verified and MUST NOT be auto-regenerated by the code under test. Changing any frozen want_ppid requires a `VECTOR-CHANGE:` PR trailer and human review — a change here means the sub derivation changed, which would silently break every existing user's identity. A value of "<FILL>" is a not-yet-frozen vector: the test FAILS loudly and prints the computed value so a human can independently verify and freeze it.
